title: calea axillaris var. urticifolia
intro: Calea axillaris var. urticifolia, also known as Mexican Damiana, is a perennial plant native to Mexico, belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing anxiety, improving sleep quality, and relieving menstrual cramps. Calea axillaris var. urticifolia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health concerns.
